services.title: Captain For Hire
services.label: Navigation
services.summary: Experienced helm support for owner outings, training runs, commercial work, and planned vessel moves.
services.menuDescription: Professional captain support for charters, training, deliveries, and owner assistance.
services.description: Professional captain support for charters, instruction, deliveries, and vessel oversight throughout the NYC Hudson River area.

subservices.title: Owner-Assisted Outings
subservices.description: Bring on a licensed captain for day trips, guest outings, and confidence at the helm while you stay involved.

subservices.title: Commercial Charter Support
subservices.description: Hire one of our captained boats to support film work, inspections, transportation, or other commercial needs by the hour.

subservices.title: Instruction
subservices.description: Hands-on instruction for boat handling, docking, local navigation, safety procedures, and electronics operation.

subservices.title: Delivery
subservices.description: Captain and crew support to move your vessel safely between ports with route planning and steady communication.

subservices.title: Maintenance Captain
subservices.description: Oversight for service scheduling, yard coordination, sea trials, and upgrade projects when your boat needs a captain on the ground.

services.title: Launch Service
services.label: Dockside
services.summary: Dockside help and launch-day preparation for a smoother departure and more confidence from the start.
services.menuDescription: Dockside help, launch prep, and departure-day coordination for a smooth start.
services.description: Launch-day help built around preparation, dockside coordination, and a smoother departure from the start.

subservices.title: Pre-Launch Prep
subservices.description: Hands-on support with lines, fenders, batteries, fluids, and final readiness before your boat leaves the dock.

subservices.title: Dock Handling Assistance
subservices.description: Experienced help with line handling, maneuvering in tight marinas, and getting underway cleanly.

subservices.title: Systems Walkthrough
subservices.description: A practical launch-day review of onboard systems, controls, and safety gear so owners feel ready to go.

subservices.title: Departure Coordination
subservices.description: Coordination with marina staff, trailers, travel lifts, or your crew to keep the day moving smoothly.

services.title: Maintenance
services.label: Care
services.summary: Routine vessel care and seasonal upkeep to keep your boat clean, prepared, and ready to use.
services.menuDescription: Routine vessel care, cleaning, and seasonal maintenance planning throughout the season.
services.description: Routine vessel care and maintenance planning to help keep your boat prepared, clean, and ready for the season.

subservices.title: Oil Change
subservices.description: Routine oil and filter service to help keep your engine protected and ready for the season.

subservices.title: Washing and Detailing
subservices.description: Exterior washdowns, interior cleanup, and appearance-focused care that keeps your boat looking sharp.

subservices.title: Seasonal Commissioning
subservices.description: Spring startup and seasonal readiness checks for batteries, systems, safety gear, and general preparation.

subservices.title: Bottom Paint and Repainting
subservices.description: Coordination and support for repainting, bottom paint work, and cosmetic refresh projects.

subservices.title: Fluid and Battery Checks
subservices.description: Regular checks for batteries, bilge systems, fluids, and other core maintenance items that are easy to miss.

services.title: Boat Repair
services.label: Repair
services.summary: Troubleshooting and repair coordination when something needs attention fast and you want a clear plan.
services.menuDescription: Mechanical troubleshooting, repair coordination, and follow-through when systems need attention.
services.description: Boat repair support focused on troubleshooting, service coordination, and practical next steps when your vessel needs attention.

subservices.title: Mechanical Troubleshooting
subservices.description: Hands-on diagnostics for common engine and mechanical issues to identify the problem before repairs begin.

subservices.title: Pump and Plumbing Repairs
subservices.description: Support for bilge pumps, washdown systems, plumbing lines, and other onboard water-related systems.

subservices.title: Steering and Control Repairs
subservices.description: Assessment and repair coordination for steering systems, throttle controls, and related hardware.

subservices.title: Cosmetic Repair Coordination
subservices.description: Help organizing fiberglass, gelcoat, trim, and finish work when your boat needs cosmetic attention.

services.title: Marine Electronics
services.label: Systems
services.summary: Installation, upgrades, and diagnostics for onboard systems and electronics that need to work when you need them.
services.menuDescription: Electronics installs, upgrades, troubleshooting, and onboard diagnostics support.
services.description: Onboard electronics support for installs, upgrades, troubleshooting, and practical system improvements.

subservices.title: Chartplotter Installation
subservices.description: Install and configure chartplotters and navigation displays so critical information is easy to access underway.

subservices.title: VHF and Radio Setup
subservices.description: Install, replace, or reconfigure radio systems for dependable communication and safer operation.

subservices.title: Sonar and Fish Finder Upgrades
subservices.description: Upgrade sonar and fish finder equipment with practical guidance on fit, layout, and system integration.

subservices.title: Electronics Diagnostics
subservices.description: Troubleshoot wiring, displays, sensors, and networked systems when electronics stop behaving the way they should.

services.title: Drone Aerial Photography
services.label: Media
services.summary: Clean aerial photos and video for listings, inspections, waterfront documentation, and marina visuals.
services.menuDescription: Aerial photo and video support for listings, inspections, marina views, and documentation.
services.description: Drone aerial photography services for vessel listings, inspections, progress updates, and polished waterfront visuals.

subservices.title: Listing Photography
subservices.description: High-angle photos and video to present your vessel clearly for private sale, broker listings, or marketing materials.

subservices.title: Inspection Imagery
subservices.description: Aerial views that support inspections, condition documentation, and a clearer look at access-limited areas.

subservices.title: Waterfront Coverage
subservices.description: Aerial photo and video packages for docks, marinas, waterfront access, and surrounding property context.

subservices.title: Project Progress Documentation
subservices.description: Repeat aerial captures to document maintenance work, marina improvements, or seasonal project milestones.

services.title: Towing Services
services.label: Support
services.summary: Responsive towing help when your vessel needs prompt attention, local coordination, and dependable assistance.
services.menuDescription: Fast local towing support when your vessel needs prompt, dependable help.
services.description: Responsive towing support when a vessel needs prompt attention, local coordination, and dependable assistance.

subservices.title: Emergency Tow
subservices.description: Prompt towing support when your boat is disabled and needs safe transport to a dock, marina, or service point.

subservices.title: Disabled Vessel Assistance
subservices.description: On-water help for breakdowns, loss of power, and situations where your vessel needs practical immediate support.

subservices.title: Marina-to-Marina Relocation
subservices.description: Assistance moving a vessel between marinas or service locations when running under its own power is not the best option.

subservices.title: Dockside Recovery Coordination
subservices.description: Follow-up coordination once a tow is complete so the next repair, haul-out, or dockside step is already in motion.
